source_rationale: KRT7 is a cytokeratin marking simple/glandular epithelial cells, strongly upregulated here
KRT19 is a luminal epithelial marker characteristic of ductal/secretory epithelium
KRT17 marks basal/myoepithelial cells and is associated with progenitor epithelial phenotypes
EPCAM is a canonical epithelial cell adhesion molecule distinguishing epithelial from non-epithelial cells
CDH1 (E-cadherin) is a hallmark of epithelial cell identity and cell-cell adhesion
MMP7 is expressed by epithelial cells, particularly in airway and glandular epithelium
TP63 is a transcription factor marking basal epithelial cells
TACSTD2 (TROP2) is an epithelial surface antigen enriched in progenitor epithelial cells
GPRC5A is a retinoic acid-induced receptor highly expressed in lung epithelial cells
ELF3 is an epithelial-specific ETS transcription factor important in epithelial differentiation
MHC class II gene highly expressed in professional antigen-presenting cells like dendritic cells
CLEC9A is a specific marker of conventional dendritic cells type 1 (cDC1)
WDFY4 is required for cross-presentation and is a hallmark of cDC1 dendritic cells
IRF8 is a transcription factor essential for cDC1 development and identity
IDO1 is an immunomodulatory enzyme expressed by activated dendritic cells
CADM1 is a cell adhesion molecule used as a surface marker for cDC1 cells
ZBTB46 is a transcription factor specifically expressed in classical dendritic cells
CPVL is a carboxypeptidase enriched in dendritic cells involved in antigen processing
S100B is expressed in certain dendritic cell subsets and neural crest-derived cells
CD74 (invariant chain) is essential for MHC II antigen presentation in dendritic cells
CLEC10A (CD301) is a specific marker of conventional dendritic cells type 2 (cDC2)
CD1C is a canonical surface marker for cDC2 dendritic cells
FCER1A (high-affinity IgE receptor alpha) is expressed on cDC2 and basophils
MHC class II alpha chain highly expressed in antigen-presenting dendritic cells
AREG (amphiregulin) is produced by activated cDC2 cells in tissue repair contexts

KLRD1 (CD94) is an NK receptor expressed on cytotoxic CD8+ T cells
S100B is highly expressed in Langerhans cells, a specialized dendritic cell subset

MHC class II molecule highly expressed in Langerhans cells for antigen presentation
